fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the entry number that has been assigned for the job WIP total.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the job that is associated with the job WIP total.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Job Task No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the project task that is associated with the project WIP total. The project task number is generally the final task in a group of tasks that is set to Total or the last project task line.

fields.name: WIP Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the work in process (WIP) calculation method that is associated with a project. The value in the field comes from the WIP method specified on the project card.

fields.name: WIP Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when work in process (WIP) was last calculated and entered in the Project WIP Entries window.

fields.name: WIP Posting Date Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies a filter for posting dates that are associated with WIP calculations.

fields.name: WIP Planning Date Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies a filter for planning dates that are associated with WIP calculations.

fields.name: WIP Warnings
fields.tooltip: Specifies if there are WIP warnings associated with a project for which you have calculated WIP.

fields.name: Posted to G/L
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the job WIP total has been posted to the general ledger.

fields.name: Schedule (Total Cost)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the budgeted costs for the project.

fields.name: Schedule (Total Price)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the budgeted prices for the project.

fields.name: Usage (Total Cost)
fields.tooltip: Specifies project usage in relation to total cost up to the date of the last project WIP calculation.

fields.name: Usage (Total Price)
fields.tooltip: Specifies project usage in relation to total price up to the date of the last project WIP calculation.

fields.name: Contract (Total Cost)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the billable in relation to total cost up to the date of the last project WIP calculation.

fields.name: Contract (Total Price)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the billable in relation to the total price up to the date of the last project WIP calculation.

fields.name: Contract (Invoiced Price)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price amount that has been invoiced and posted in relation to the billable for the current WIP calculation.

fields.name: Contract (Invoiced Cost)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost amount that has been invoiced and posted in relation to the billable for the current WIP calculation.

fields.name: Calc. Recog. Sales Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the calculated sum of recognized sales amounts in the current WIP calculation.

fields.name: Calc. Recog. Costs Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the calculated sum of recognized costs amounts in the current WIP calculation.

fields.name: Cost Completion %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost completion percentage for project tasks that have been budgeted in the current WIP calculation.

fields.name: Invoiced %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of contracted project tasks that have been invoiced in the current WIP calculation.
